LanguageData.Chemsined: Should muffalo go for your rot gut: {0}
LanguageData.VFES_bringIngredientsDesc: Bring chemfuel to the rot gut barrel to start fermentation
LanguageData.VFES_cancelIngredientsDesc: Cancel bringing chemfuel to the rot gut barrel.
LanguageData.VFES_removeProductDesc: Remove rot gut from the rot gut barrel.
